summary: Complete frontend testing of AI Governance Starter Kit CTA and Cases page functionality. All 8 core features tested successfully with no critical bugs found.
passed_tests: Home page AI Governance Starter Kit CTA displays correctly
Starter Kit email input field accepts user input
Starter Kit form submission triggers mailto functionality
Navigation bar includes CASES link and navigates properly
Cases page displays 5 case studies with sector tags
Case detail drawer opens with Challenge/Approach/Outcomes sections
Case drawer includes quote and deliverables sections
Case drawer CTA links to Connect page
Home page bottom section includes working link to Cases
Cases page CTA successfully links to Connect page
